cn.releaseNotes: Includes stability improvements, minor UI updates, and bug fixes.
cn.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

Wafari 手表浏览器，让你的Apple Watch轻松浏览网页

- 支持多种搜索引擎，搜索自定义
- 书签快速创建和同步
- 浏览历史记录
- iCloud同步数据

欢迎使用

cn.releaseNotes:
New in 1.0.8: 
- New Sun and moon dual view. 
- New Large sized widget 
- Choice of sun, moon, or both for medium widget (as requested) 
- New activity mode view — Get key insight on lighting for Photography, Hiking, Screens, Gardening, and Stargazing. The sun's data, tailored to how you actually spend your day.
- Improved forecast view
- Multi-location support 
- Time simulator mode
cn.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com
这是一款以《英雄无敌》玩法为游戏原型，战斗参考了《英雄之时》采用快节奏的自走棋模式的单局存档式回合制策略游戏。游戏以《帝国时代》为游戏背景，游戏内拥有多个种族，每个种族以各个国家的文明特点作为种族风格，如法兰西、华夏、古罗马，等。美术风格采用Q版像素呈现。玩家在单局游戏内，发展家园、培养英雄、建立部队、探索地图，结合各种策略，击败所有对手，获得最终胜利。

hk.description:

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

適合：
- 預約（醫生、大使館等）
- 客戶服務或技術支援
- 致電公共辦公室
- 自由工作者和企業主跟進客戶

無論您是打電話預約醫生、聯繫客戶服務，還是在線路繁忙時嘗試連接，此應用程式都可以節省時間和避免煩惱。


隱私權政策：

https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1

使用條款（最終使用者許可協議）：

Apple App Store：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

適合：
- 預約（醫生、大使館等）
- 客戶服務或技術支援
- 致電公共辦公室
- 自由工作者和企業主跟進客戶

無論您是打電話預約醫生、聯繫客戶服務，還是在線路繁忙時嘗試連接，此應用程式都可以節省時間和避免煩惱。


隱私權政策：

https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1

使用條款（最終使用者許可協議）：

Apple App Store：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

tw.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

us.releaseNotes: - 修复了多行显示设置无法保存的问题
us.description:
- 按条文编号查找
- 按条文内容查找
- 按方剂名称查找

- 收藏重点条目和方剂
- 笔记功能
- 复制条文

本App仅供中医爱好者和从业者学习参考使用，具体使用谨遵明医。
内容校订需要精力和时间，如有遗漏欢迎留言评论。

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs.

This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy.

Main Features:
- Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls.
- Set number of retries and time intervals.
- Schedule calls in advance via calendar.
- Add extensions automatically after dialing.
- Enable vibration before each redial.
- Call history and retry stats.

Perfect for:
- Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.)
- Customer service or tech support
- Calling public offices
- Freelancers and business owners following up clients

Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.


Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1

Apple App Store
https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

us.releaseNotes: Includes stability improvements, minor UI updates, and bug fixes.
us.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

us.releaseNotes:
This app has been updated by Apple to display the Apple Watch app icon.

支持新版本iOS. 可下載其他語言聖經(通過設置菜單可直接顯示或隱藏不同版本聖經)。用拼音加註選中中文並可讀出。
us.trackName: 聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
us.description:
聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
	Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading.
	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.
us.trackCensoredName: 聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)

Discover and conquer countless worlds across deep space. Unravel a story full of challenges and threats that will lead you across the galaxy on an extraordinary voyage. 

Nothing lasts long in deep space, and peace is not an exception!
Welcome to Iron Marines: Invasion!

Enjoy unique stage missions and special operations in exciting new worlds, each one with its own particular terrain, style, enemies, and conditions. Learn how to beat them one by one!

Command the Federation’s troops across the galaxy, with the aid of Heroes & Units that will allow you to boost your RTS game skills to the limit.

Battle extraordinary enemies and ferocious alien creatures in fun and electrifying missions. Plan your strategy to defend the peace in the galaxy!

For all Iron Marines & SciFi action fans who get the kicks of offline RTS games and strategy games. Become the tactical specialist you’re meant to be by leading your own army in thrilling, mind-blowing missions.

The invasion is at our gates!
Lead the fiercest combat corps across the galaxy. Fight side by side with the Federation’s toughest Marines!

Now you can combine your squad and take advantage of each Unit’s unique fighting skills: from rangers to snipers, mechas, missile launchers, or fearsome alien warrior clans.

Train jaw-dropping heroes and their useful abilities: from boosting up your army’s morale and firepower to increase their stamina and reach, or detecting upcoming enemies before they attack you. Help them join the fight to keep peace among the worlds!

Become an expert on the galaxy’s biggest mysteries!

Use an in-game Encyclopedia to understand the worlds you explore or identify the enemies you face. Take advantage of the tactical info available to configure your strategic game plan.

Check all the amazing features of this real-time strategy space odyssey:
- An entire galaxy to be discovered.
- 25+ campaign missions that will take you to the most incredible worlds. Tons of planets for you to explore and defend by planning a tight strategic game plan!
- 75+ special operations for you to upgrade your Marine abilities to the peak level.
- 10 Unit groups for a total of 24 different troops. You can even combine your backup depending on the mission and strategy you’re planning to deploy.
- 9 powerful heroes with strong skills for you to train. Help them become the Galaxy’s finest!
- 8 Special Weapons to boost your army tactics to the stars! Set your game plan and take advantage of instant weapons like bouncers, toxic bombs, or even drone factories.
- 40 Upgrades to improve your strategy and empower your units with defense drones, napalm rockets, ricocheting blasts and much more.
- 20+ Achievements to show how much of a real-time strategy expert you’ve become!

Choose your difficulty mode for the best rts games experience: Casual, Normal, or Veteran. And if you think you’ve seen it all across the galaxy… the impossible mode - only for the elite players, available offline!

Prove yourself in daily challenges and collect amazing rewards.

Play rts games offline: Enjoy the awesome real-time strategy experience anywhere, as you explore incredible worlds.

Iron Marines Invasion will give you hours of colorful, fun gameplay in this epic real-time strategy space odyssey, available to play RTS offline game.

us.description:
--

Awards:
● 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT: Official Selection
● Busan Indie Connect 2020: Excellence in Casual
● Bahamut 2020 ACG Creation Contest: Bronze Award

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Features:
● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban
● 150 handcrafted rooms
● Fantasy themed pixel art
● Non-linear dungeon map

--

● Follow us on Twitter
https://twitter.com/nekolyst
● Like us on Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/Nekolyst
● Join our Discord server
https://discord.gg/A7Sss9d

us.description:
"Did you know that “Schadenfreude” is a German word defined as the concept of finding joy in someone else’s misfortune? It is also the main idea on which Neighbours back From Hell is built. A whole TV show based on playing increasingly outrageous pranks on your grumpy neighbor to keep the audience entertained, and viewership numbers high. It’s good to be bad in this early 2000s trash TV-inspired slapstick extravaganza! 

As Woody, the vengeful star protagonist of Neighbours back From Hell, you will prank your way through Seasons 1 and 2 of the fictitious, but aptly named TV show. Take the mischief from your nasty neighbor’s flat all the way to China, India, and Mexico where you will make sure his holiday is a living hell. While you’re at it, why limit targeting your antics at your neighbor, when you can involve his mother and fellow travelers? Whatever you decide to do, your trusty camera crew will be right there and keep a keen eye on all the action. You can let your crooked creativity flow freely and watch the neighbor rage in desperation. Just be mindful not to get caught by him or his companions, or they will whoop you good and your TV show will be taken off the air. If you perform well on the other hand, by creating more and more disarray and chaos in the neighbor’s life, ratings will increase, and you could win prestigious awards. "

Neighbours From Hell 1 & 2 Remastered in one package: 28 episodes set in the neighbor’s home, on a cruise liner, and in several different holiday locations around the world 

- All graphics newly rendered in Full HD 
- Framerate of all animations doubled for a smoother experience  
- Use stealth, skill, and style to perform the perfect ambush 
- Easy to use interface and controls 
- Superb cartoon-style graphics 
- Big band soundtrack 
- Game Center support
- Full controller support

© HandyGames

Wingspan is a relaxing, award-winning strategy card game about birds for 1 to 5 players. Each bird you play extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your three habitats. Your goal is to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. 

You are bird enthusiasts—researchers, bird watchers, ornithologists, and collectors—seeking to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. Each bird extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your habitats. Each habitat focuses on a key aspect of the growth of your preserves.

In Wingspan up to 5 players compete to build up their nature preserves in a limited number of turns. Each beautiful bird that you add to your preserve makes you better at laying eggs, drawing cards, or gathering food. Many of the 170 unique birds have powers that echo real life: your hawks will hunt, your pelicans will fish, and your geese will form a flock.

Features
- Relaxing strategy card game where your goal is to discover and attract the best birds.
- Single player and multiplayer modes for up to five players.
- Based on award winning, competitive, card-driven, engine-building board game.
- Hundreds of unique, animated birds with their real life sound recordings.
- Multiple ways to accumulate points with birds, bonus cards and end-of-round goals.
us.releaseNotes:
Fixed:
- An issue where a specific bird combination allowed a bird’s power to be repeated
- American Oystercatcher’s power resetting
- The Back button appearing during card drawing after reloading the game
- The overview board and player’s hand hiding when playing against Automa
- Gaining food from the Duet map after playing a predator triggering some pink powers incorrectly
- Misplaced tooltips in the overview

- An issue where exchanging cards with another player in Automarazzi mode during a tucking action could cause a turn skip

us.description:
Get ready to jump into action and show the Kingdom who’s the real boss in the best tower defense game!

Face empires of mighty enemies. Clash against supreme bosses, unlocking and switching to new towers. Train legendary heroes and get all the achievements using your strategy in this amazing TD game.

Kingdom Rush Vengeance will give you hours and hours of gameplay in the best tower defense game available! 

Heroes, your Army, Enemies, and legendary td bossfights!
- 17 Powerful HEROES who will, without hesitation, rush into action at your command
- LEVEL UP YOUR HEROES  and upgrade their abilities
- 10+ TRINKETS AND ARTEFACTS for that extra action in battle.
- NEW POWERS AND REINFORCEMENTS to vanquish your foes, td style!
- 30 UPGRADES to train your army to their best form.
- 60+ DEADLY ENEMIES that will put all of your wit and strategic skills to the test
- RUSH TO SAVE THE KINGDOM as you bring down 6 mighty bosses in the most legendary boss fights!

Epic Selection of Towers and Upgrades
- 22 NEW TOWERS to defend your kingdom
- UNIQUE ABILITIES AND SPECIAL POWER for every tower
- Choose your arsenal of towers and execute your strategy. 

Create devastating combinations of towers, abilities and special powers to stop your enemies!

Near Endless Tower Defense Gameplay

- 42 CHALLENGING STAGES that will test your skills
- 9 DIFFERENT REALMS to conquer and explore
- EXPLORE new lands in the Kingdom
- 60+ ACHIEVEMENTS, hidden secrets, and fun stuff for you to play and discover while you explore the realm!
- UNLOCK HEROIC AND IRON CHALLENGES on all stages
- CASUAL, NORMAL, VETERAN OR IMPOSSIBLE difficulty for every level
- Summon enemy waves faster to earn additional gold

Time for some Royal Vengeance in the Kingdom!
Vez’nan, the powerful almighty wizard has returned. 

Lead your powerful dark army and make the Kingdom tremble with each step. Help Vez’nan conquer new lands in the kingdom! 

Orcs, goblins, demons, dark knights, zombies, and many more! Choose your favorites and mix them to find the most deadly tower defense combination - secure the crown of the kingdom for Vez’nan.

Awesome Offline Tower Defense Game

No Wi-Fi at your Dark Tower?

- PLAY ANYWHERE - playing offline works, if your wifi doesn’t
- PLAY OFFLINE - no internet connection required
- You can play Kingdom Rush Vengeance as your offline TD game of choice. 


--------------------------------------------------

HEARD ON THE MEDIA:
"For veteran Kingdom Rush players and newcomers alike, the charm and strategy of the franchise remains with Kingdom Rush: Vengeance, making it one of the best mobile games of 2018!"
-Polygon

"Kingdom Rush Vengeance is the biggest and baddest the series has been."
-148Apps

"Players with any affinity for tower-defense games are going to enjoy every second they spend with Kingdom Rush Vengeance!"
-Pocket gamer

"The game is intensely engaging with a light-hearted tone that makes it a real pleasure to jump into."
-Pocket tactics

Get Lord Vez’nan’s latest news here:
https://www.kingdomrushvengeance.com/

Video creators, podcast creators, and streamers:
We would love to see your content on Youtube and Twitch! We support and promote channel creators so, if you want us to showcase your videos or want to know more about our games, feel free to write to us to contact@ironhidegames.com

us.description:
Burn rubber and shred metal in the ultimate driving playground!

Wreckfest is jam-packed with upgrade and customization options. Whether you are preparing for your next demolition derby with reinforced bumpers, roll cages, side protectors and much more, or setting your car up for a banger race with engine performance parts like air filters, camshafts, fuel systems, etc., Wreckfest is shaping up to be the best combative motorsport game out there. 

• Unique Racing Experience – Exhilarating no-rules racing action with defining, once-in-a-lifetime moments that can be achieved only with a true-to-life physics simulation. Witness insane neck-to-neck fighting on high-speed circuits, face total destruction madness on crazy courses with intersections and oncoming traffic, or go for demolition dominance in derby arenas.

• Awesome Cars – Our cars are old, banged up, patched together... They ooze style and character! From old American heavy-hitters to agile Europeans and fun Asians, you won’t find anything like this in other games. 

• Meaningful Customization – Change not only the look of your cars but also upgrade their body armor – Reinforce them with heavy iron that protects you from damage, but also adds weight, which impacts the cars handling. Modify your car to make a robust tank or a fragile but lightning-fast rocket, or anything in between!

• Multiplayer – Wreck your friends in local multiplayer and take racing to the limit while chasing for demolition dominance!

• Challenge modes – Have hilarious fun with crop harvesters, lawn mowers, school buses, three-wheelers and much more! 

• Career Mode – Battle for championships, earn experience, unlock new upgrades and cars, and become the all-time Wreckfest champion!

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

本App仅供中医爱好者和从业者学习参考使用，具体使用谨遵明医。

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs.

This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy.

Main Features:
- Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls.
- Set number of retries and time intervals.
- Schedule calls in advance via calendar.
- Add extensions automatically after dialing.
- Enable vibration before each redial.
- Call history and retry stats.

Perfect for:
- Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.)
- Customer service or tech support
- Calling public offices
- Freelancers and business owners following up clients

Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.


Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1

Terms of Use (EULA):
Apple App Store
https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

tr.releaseNotes: Includes stability improvements, minor UI updates, and bug fixes.
tr.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

Wafari Watch Browser, allowing you to effortlessly browse the web on your Apple Watch.

Supports multiple search engines with customizable search options.
Quick bookmark creation and synchronization.
Browsing history.
iCloud data synchronization.
Welcome to use!

tr.releaseNotes:
New in 1.0.8: 
- New Sun and moon dual view. 
- New Large sized widget 
- Choice of sun, moon, or both for medium widget (as requested) 
- New activity mode view — Get key insight on lighting for Photography, Hiking, Screens, Gardening, and Stargazing. The sun's data, tailored to how you actually spend your day.
- Improved forecast view
- Multi-location support 
- Time simulator mode
tr.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

Com esta aplicação, pode fazer chamadas automáticas para os números que desejar de forma eficiente e personalizada. Pode definir o número de repetições, o intervalo entre chamadas, adicionar um posto, ativar a vibração antes de marcar e até mesmo agendar as suas chamadas utilizando um calendário integrado. A Auto Redial App oferece ainda uma interface simples e intuitiva, um histórico de chamadas detalhado e várias opções de personalização para se adequar às suas necessidades.

Esta aplicação é ideal para quem precisa de fazer chamadas repetitivas automaticamente — como uma chamada para uma consulta, uma nova tentativa de chamada quando o número está ocupado ou contactar serviços onde a linha está ocupada.

Principais características:
- Redisque automaticamente as chamadas ocupadas ou não atendidas.
- Defina o número de tentativas e os intervalos de tempo.
- Agende chamadas com antecedência via calendário.
- Adicione os ramais automaticamente após a marcação.
- Ative a vibração antes de cada rediscagem.
- Histórico de chamadas e estatísticas de novas tentativas.

Perfeito para:
- Marcação de consultas (médicas, embaixadas, etc.)
- Atendimento ao cliente ou suporte técnico
- Telefonar para repartições públicas
- Freelancers e empresários a acompanhar clientes

Quer esteja a ligar para marcar uma consulta médica, falar com o serviço de apoio ao cliente ou apenas a tentar ligar-se quando a linha está ocupada, esta aplicação poupa tempo e frustração.


Política de Privacidade:
https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1

Termos de Uso (EULA):
Apple App Store
https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
